message:
feat(transport): Enhance codec and transport robustness

Comprehensive improvements to MCP transport layer:

Codec Enhancements:
- Add max_message_size() getter and set_max_message_size() setter
- Improve message size limit enforcement per-line instead of buffer-total
- Clear buffer on oversized messages for better error recovery
- Refactor tests to use cleaner assertion patterns

Transport Improvements:
- Enhanced async I/O utilities
- Improved SSE transport handling
- Stdio transport robustness
- WebSocket transport enhancements

Server/Client:
- Client library improvements
- Server routing enhancements
- Expanded test coverage
- Macro improvements

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
